name: Xinyu Iron & Steel Co., Ltd
summary: Xinyu Iron & Steel Co., Ltd produces and sells steel products in China. The company offers steel pipes, strips, wires, and strands; hot rolled coils, cold rolled sheets, wire rods, and rebars; and round, threaded, and ball flat steel products, as well as other metal products. It also exports its products to approximately 20 countries and regions, including Europe, the United States, Brazil, the Middle East, South Korea, Japan, Southeast Asia, and India. The company is based in Xinyu, China.
